title.en: The body of the Lord of Gu Peng was once again ...

content.en:
Gu Peng's Lord's body was shattered through the penetration, but he healed quickly.

He tried to retreat, but an eagle-like primeval creature appeared and continued to hunt it down.

Bang!

The body of the Lord of Gu Peng was once again pierced and shattered.

"Damn!

After the Lord of Gu Peng recovered, he scolded angrily.

If it were in the outside world, he would definitely be able to beat this primeval beast out of, but in this treasure land, he was really not an opponent, and he had no power to resist.

Hit again and again.

Finally, the Lord of Gu Peng couldn't hold it anymore and was killed by this primeval beast.

Next, very powerful primeval beasts appeared one after another in this treasure land, causing many bone transformation realms to flee.

The weak Bone Transformation Realm was the first to run out, not daring to enter again.

They would not dare to enter until they had cleared out those powerful primeval beasts by the Lord of the Ruins.

However.

Thundered!!!!

The Lord of the Ruins fights with a terrifying primeval beast, fighting each other indiscriminately.

Soon, some primeval creatures arrived.

In desperation, he left.

After all, in this treasure land, the number and strength of the primeval beasts are above them, so there is no need to fight hard.

......

Ye Tian was also in trouble, but his strength was not bad, so he avoided danger.

Moreover, he is a copy of the body, even if it falls, it doesn't matter.

Therefore, when the other bone transformation realms left, he did not leave, but continued to look for resources here.

this day.

He also really found a good thing.

"Swire Source Crystal !!"

Ye Tian has vests in the Mixed Ruins Cave, Xishan, and Zhenlong Cave, so his knowledge is not shallow, and he naturally knows the Taigu Source Crystal.

The Ancient Source Crystal could be said to be a treasure resource that was very suitable for refining the Infinite Bone, and it was of great help to him.

If there were hundreds of primeval source crystals, he would be sure to raise his cultivation to the extreme of a bone transformation realm.

"Good stuff!"

Ye Tian put away this piece of primeval source crystal, and then continued to search.

to see if I could find other primeval source crystals, but after searching for a long time, I didn't find the second primeval source crystal, but was chased and killed by some primeval murderous things.

"It's too dangerous in this treasure land, you will be chased and killed by the primeval beast at every turn, and you have to copy the body of an ancient beast and find resources here as an ancient beast, so it's easier!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

He made a copy of an Ancient Murder that he had killed, and then searched here for resources and the Ancient Source Crystal.

Other than that.

His other two vest water ran out after Heavenly Ancestor and Long Yan Heavenly Ancestor had mixed around this treasure land.

After that, he was going to let these two vests break through to the Bone Transformation Realm, and he said that he had found an opportunity in this treasure land, and the other Bone Transformation Realms would not doubt it.

......

Cave of the Ruins.

Shui Ji Tianzu began to practice here, and successively completed the bone transformation of immeasurable bones.

When the last immeasurable bone bone transformation, his cultivation broke through and stepped into the bone transformation realm.

Rumble!!!!!

The energy from the outside world continued to pour into his body, making his aura stronger and stronger.

And this breakthrough naturally alarmed the entire Chaos Cave.

Knowing that the Shui Ji Heavenly Ancestor had broken through, the Masters of the Ruins who had just returned were all celebrating for the Shui Ji Heavenly Ancestor.

And Ye Tian's external publicity was the opportunity he found in that treasure land, which immediately made many primeval-level geniuses who were trapped in the realm of the Nine Blood Transformation Realms ready to move, and they couldn't wait to enter that treasure land immediately.

But it was rumored that there was a bone transformation realm that had fallen, and they didn't dare to break in, so they could only wait and see.

The other side.

True Dragon Cave Heaven.

Ye Tian's other vest dragon Yan Heavenly Ancestor also began to impact the Bone Transformation Realm, and soon broke through and became an ancient-level genius in the Bone Transformation Realm.

And Ye Tian's vest also said that it was a resource opportunity found in that treasure land.

At this moment, it completely stimulated those primeval-level geniuses, and they couldn't help it one by one.

Thereupon.

They broke into the treasure land.

As a result, one by one, primeval-level geniuses fell and were killed by primeval murderous creatures.

The primeval-level genius of the Dark Sea, the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor, wanted to enter, but was stopped by Ye Tian, so he was not allowed to enter.

Otherwise, the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor is estimated to have fallen.

Soon, the news spread, and these primordial-level geniuses escaped from the treasure land one by one, while the other primordial-level geniuses who did not enter were very happy.

"Lord of Endless, thank you for stopping me, otherwise I'm afraid I might fall!"

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor thanked.

"It's nothing, in short, don't enter that treasure land easily, it is said that even the Lord of Gu Peng and several other bone transformation realms have fallen, it is not a good place there!" Ye Tian said.

Strictly speaking, those fallen primordial-level geniuses were killed by him.

That treasure land did have a lot of precious resources, even the primeval source crystal.

However, if you don't have enough strength, you can't survive!

An ancient-level genius in the realm of nine blood transformations dared to enter there, wasn't this looking for death?

His two vests just went in for a while, and he didn't do anything!

"These primordial-level geniuses still can't hold their breath, otherwise they won't be pitted!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

this day.

A Bone Transformation Realm being in the Boundary Gap of the Territorial Sea gave this treasure a name, naming it the Ancient Forbidden Domain.

In short, none of the top overlord-level forces recommended that the primeval-level geniuses of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm enter it, and even the ordinary Bone Transformation Realm did not dare to enter it, it was indeed too dangerous.

Dark Sea.

Ye Tian chatted with the Lord of Darkness.

"Endless Lord, this time there are four bone transformation realms in the Ancient Forbidden Realm, and the Lord of Gu Peng has all fallen. The Lord of Darkness sighed.

The strength of the Lord of Gu Peng is not inferior to him, he is a boundary-breaking genius of the Second Bone Transformation Realm, and he has only joined the Feather Alliance.

As a result, he fell in the primeval forbidden realm.

"The Taigu Peng Clan has had a lot of life now!" said the Lord of Darkness again.

"Yes, the Taigu Peng clan mainly relies on the Lord of Gu Peng, and now that the Lord of Gu Peng has fallen, where does the Taigu Peng Clan still have a status in the Feather Alliance! I heard that many bone transformation realms have captured the Taigu Peng Clan as a mount!" Ye Tian also said.

"Anyway, in a short period of time, I don't dare to enter the Ancient Forbidden Domain!" The Lord of Darkness shook his head and said, "I heard that the Ancient Source Crystal appeared in the Ancient Forbidden Domain, that's a good thing, but I can only be greedy!"

"The Lord of the Void has been in the Ancient Forbidden Realm, right?"

Ye Tiandao.

"Well, I heard that I have been in the Ancient Forbidden Domain, and with the strength of the Lord of the Void and the ability to save my life, I can also mix it up, maybe I can find a lot of Ancient Source Crystals. Those treasures also had some effect on him, and he naturally wanted to collect some as well. "The Lord of Darkness.

When Ye Tian was chatting with the Lord of Darkness, another of his primeval murderous cleature replica bodies was looking for the primeval source crystal, and he quickly gained it.
